name: Degreed Learning Experience API
what_it_does: Degreed REST API for learning experience platform (LXP) and skills intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage learning content, pathways, and assignments; query skill data and proficiency assessments; sync user and completion data; and integrate Degreed's learning ecosystem with HRIS, LMS, and talent management systems. Degreed aggregates learning from 200+ sources into a unified skill-building platform.
use_cases: Syncing learning completions and skill data with HRIS from integration agents
Assigning learning pathways based on skill gaps from talent development agents
Querying skill proficiency data from workforce planning agents
Integrating content from external providers into Degreed from content curation agents
not_for: Simple course delivery LMS without skills intelligence (use Docebo or TalentLMS)
External customer training without enterprise employee development focus
SMB without dedicated L&D function and budget
best_when: An enterprise L&D or talent team using Degreed wants AI agents to automate skill-gap-based learning assignments, sync completions with HR systems, and surface skill data for workforce planning.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee skill proficiency data and learning behavior is sensitive HR data. Skill assessments may be used in performance or advancement decisions.

auth.notes: Degreed uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for server-to-server API access. Scopes control access to specific resource types. Enterprise customer credentials via Degreed partner program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise LXP pricing per employee
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per employee or per organization
pricing.notes: Enterprise L&D platform. API access included with enterprise subscription. Developer sandbox available for integration testing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee skill and learning data used in performance decisions is sensitive HR data
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via partner program
Skills data model is complex — proficiency levels, sources, verification status all matter
Content integration requires understanding Degreed's content type taxonomy
EU and US data residency available but verify configuration at account level
ISO27001 and SOC2 certified — supports enterprise security reviews
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee skill proficiency and learning behavior. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU/US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee skill and learning data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US data residency.
